def send_notifications(users: list) -> list:
    results = [send_email(user.email) for user in users]
    return results


def log_all_events(events: list) -> list:
    logged = [logger.info(f"Event: {e}") for e in events]
    return logged


def update_records(records: list) -> list:
    updated = [db.save(r) for r in records]
    return updated


def batch_delete(items: list) -> list:
    removed = [cache.delete(item.key) for item in items]
    return removed
